name: Set-Relative RMS/Whitened Hidden Write
single_primitive: candidate-center the late history residual, normalize its request-level candidate-set spectrum, globally bound it, then write it through the same residual layer
scalar_rms_reduction: exact request-adaptive positive scalar rescaling of ordinary centered attention
whitening_nonreduction: rank>=2 whitening changes singular-mode ratios and can change the projected candidate order
binding_dilemma: large epsilon approaches fixed scalar rescale; small epsilon preferentially amplifies weak/noisy modes, including wrong-user residuals
no_history_contract: bitwise selection of untouched base score tensor
common_mode_contract: candidate projection P_C makes any candidate-common residual exactly zero
write_bound: one request-global Frobenius contraction after normalization
exact_contract: canonical exact item recurrence is one internal coordinate read by the same softplus-monotone head
